research_context.latest_dashboard: 2026-06-12 (newest technical dashboard; rotation data current as of this week)

latest_notes.title: AI Mid-Cycle Slowdown: OpenAI, Anthropic, and the AI Price War
Entegris Update: Vera Rubin Confirms the Missing Chemical Layer
AI Mid-Cycle Slowdown: From Building Intelligence to Applying It
Vera Rubin, 800V, and the Beginning of the AI Factory Era

research_context.narrative: Framing as of mid-June 2026: an "AI mid-cycle slowdown" — a pullback inside a bull market, not a bubble unwind. Secular rotation OUT of hyperscalers/Mag 7 and INTO the rest of the stack: memory, advanced packaging, specialty chemicals/materials, and 800V industrial power infrastructure (Vera Rubin "AI factory era"). NVDA roughly flat (~+2%) since 2025-10-31 and ranked 84th of 100 in the agentic thematic portfolio even as that portfolio is up ~70%. This matches the 2026-06-12 dashboard: every theme cooled week-over-week, yet ~47/100 names stayed Buyable as prior Extended names reset into fresh setups (memory, packaging, design IP, chemicals).
